api-gateway/src/main/java/com/meditrack/.general_idea: Introduce a conditional bean to decode JWTs using a JWK Set URI when the corresponding property is present.
Introduce a conditional bean to decode JWTs using a base64-encoded secret key when the corresponding property is present.
Remove the unconditional default JWT decoder bean to avoid conflicts with the new conditional beans.
Remove the @Profile annotation from the configuration class to allow it to be active in all profiles.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Uncomment and activate the SecurityFilterChain bean to explicitly define security rules, replacing the default Spring Security configuration that was causing 401 errors.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.human_impl: Changed @Bean method from commented out to active, configuring csrf, authorizeHttpRequests, and sessionManagement.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Added explanatory comments to clarify why stateless session management is configured and how Spring Security defaults work.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.human_impl: Added block comment explaining session creation policy and SecurityContext behavior.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Commented out the custom JWT filter registration, likely to simplify the security chain or debug authentication issues.
Removed the hardcoded 'None' value for the membership field during user registration.
Renamed the database table from 'userDetails' to 'user_details' to follow snake_case naming conventions.
Removed the 'membership' field from the UserEntity class.
